Are you at risk of a heart attack, stroke, or kidney damage? High blood pressure often shows no symptoms but can lead to deadly complications. Take control and empower yourself - know the warning signs:

- Headaches
- Dizziness or lightheadedness
- Nosebleeds
- Blurred vision
- Chest pain or discomfort
- Shortness of breath
- Fatigue or weakness
- Confusion or anxiety
- Palpitations or irregular heartbeat
- Blood spots in the eyes
- Swelling in the legs, ankles, and feet
- Severe headaches or migraines
- Numbness or tingling in the face, arms, or legs
- Weakness in the arms or legs
- Vision changes, such as double vision or loss of vision

Don't wait until it's too late! Get your blood pressure checked today and take charge of your health.

*Title: Ash and Frost*

The Netherrealm wind howled like the souls trapped in it. Scorpion stood at the edge of the obsidian cliff, kunai chain coiled at his hip, watching smoke rise from the crags below. 

Sub-Zero stepped from the frost. Where his boots touched, black stone turned white. His breath didn’t fog – it crystallized and fell.

“You called me here, Hanzo,” Bi-Han’s voice was cold as the Lin Kuei temple. “Speak. Or freeze.”

Scorpion didn’t turn. “I did not call you.”

“No. But your rage did.” Sub-Zero raised a palm. Ice crawled up the cliff face toward Scorpion’s boots. “The Elder Gods want us dead. Quan Chi wants us as puppets. Yet here we are, pulled to the same cursed place.”

“Then we finish it.” Chains rattled. “Get over here.”

The kunai flew. Sub-Zero slid sideways, leaving an ice statue in his place. The blade shattered it. He countered with a blast of frost – Scorpion ducked, rolled, and the ground where he’d stood became a spike field.

They clashed in the middle. Fist to gauntlet. Fire to ice. Steam screamed between them.

“You killed my kin,” Scorpion hissed, flame dancing behind his mask. “My clan. My son.”

“And you killed me,” Sub-Zero answered, catching Scorpion’s wrist, freezing the flame at its source. “But we were both lied to. We are blades swung by dead men.”

For a heartbeat, neither moved. Frost crept up Scorpion’s arm. Fire licked Sub-Zero’s chest plate. The cliff groaned.

Then Bi-Han did something Hanzo did not expect. He let go.

“Kill me, and Quan Chi wins. Again.” Sub-Zero stepped back. “My brother Kuai Liang… he seeks peace. He would end the Lin Kuei’s blood debt. I cannot. I am too far gone. But you…”

Scorpion’s flames dimmed. “Why tell me this?”

“Because the Netherrealm remembers. It showed me my own hell.” Ice formed a mirror between them. In it: Sub-Zero’s hands, around a child’s throat – Hanzo’s son. Quan Chi laughing behind him, pulling the strings. “I was his weapon. You were his fire. We were never enemies. We were tools.”

The mirror shattered. Silence, save the wind.

Scorpion sheathed the kunai. “The Shirai Ryu are ash. The Lin Kuei are frost. Ash buries frost. Frost preserves ash. We cannot be allies.”

“No,” Sub-Zero agreed. “But we can choose our enemy.”

From the chasm below, a shriek rose – Quan Chi’s scouts, sent to ensure neither left alive. Dozens of red eyes lit the dark.

Scorpion looked at Sub-Zero. Nodded once. 

“Then let it be him.”

They turned their backs to each other and faced the horde. Fire roared to Scorpion’s fists. Ice formed blades on Sub-Zero’s arms.

The first demon leapt. It was met by a spear of flame and a shard of frost at the same time. It didn’t scream. It vaporized.

When it was over, the cliff was glass – half melted, half frozen. Two warriors stood in the center, breathing hard, not looking at each other.

“Next time we meet,” Scorpion said, walking into the smoke, “I will still try to kill you.”

“I would expect nothing less,” Sub-Zero answered, vanishing into snow. 

Behind them, ash and frost swirled together, and for the first time in centuries, neither consumed the other

This slide outlines the 2026 direction for SMARTS.

First is Enterprise.
This focuses on testing and evaluating execution routes, and co deploying strategies in a secure sandbox environment.
The goal is to improve performance, risk control, and institutional readiness.

Second is Treasury.
SMARTS plans to launch a Treasury pool dedicated to funding security upgrades, research, infrastructure scaling, and continuous product improvements.

Third is Governance.
This introduces structured community participation, giving users a formal voice in platform level decisions as the ecosystem grows.

Fourth is APIs.
SMARTS will open APIs to approved partners, enabling deeper integrations and expanding the ecosystem through controlled collaboration.

The key message is progression.
2026 is focused on strengthening infrastructure, improving transparency, and expanding responsibly rather than rushing expansion.

They clashed in the middle. Fist to gauntlet. Fire to ice. Steam screamed between them.

“You killed my kin,” Scorpion hissed, flame dancing behind his mask. “My clan. My son.”

“And you killed me,” Sub-Zero answered, catching Scorpion’s wrist, freezing the flame at its source. “But we were both lied to. We are blades swung by dead men.”

For a heartbeat, neither moved. Frost crept up Scorpion’s arm. Fire licked Sub-Zero’s chest plate. The cliff groaned.

Then Bi-Han did something Hanzo did not expect. He let go.

“Kill me, and Quan Chi wins. Again.” Sub-Zero stepped back. “My brother Kuai Liang… he seeks peace. He would end the Lin Kuei’s blood debt. I cannot. I am too far gone. But you…”

Scorpion’s flames dimmed. “Why tell me this?”

“Because the Netherrealm remembers. It showed me my own hell.” Ice formed a mirror between them. In it: Sub-Zero’s hands, around a child’s throat – Hanzo’s son. Quan Chi laughing behind him, pulling the strings. “I was his weapon. You were his fire. We were never enemies. We were tools.”

The mirror shattered. Silence, save the wind.

Scorpion sheathed the kunai. “The Shirai Ryu are ash. The Lin Kuei are frost. Ash buries frost. Frost preserves ash. We cannot be allies.”

“No,” Sub-Zero agreed. “But we can choose our enemy.”

From the chasm below, a shriek rose – Quan Chi’s scouts, sent to ensure neither left alive. Dozens of red eyes lit the dark.

Scorpion looked at Sub-Zero. Nodded once. 

“Then let it be him.”

They turned their backs to each other and faced the horde. Fire roared to Scorpion’s fists. Ice formed blades on Sub-Zero’s arms.

The first demon leapt. It was met by a spear of flame and a shard of frost at the same time. It didn’t scream. It vaporized.

When it was over, the cliff was glass – half melted, half frozen. Two warriors stood in the center, breathing hard, not looking at each other.

“Next time we meet,” Scorpion said, walking into the smoke, “I will still try to kill you.”

“I would expect nothing less,” Sub-Zero answered, vanishing into snow. 

Behind them, ash and frost swirled together, and for the first time in centuries, neither consumed the other-The End

*STROKE; Treatment.*

*Stroke* occurs when the blood supply to part of your brain is interrupted or reduced, depriving brain tissue of oxygen and nutrients. Within minutes, brain cells begin to die.

*CAUSES;*

√ Blocked artery (ischemic stroke).
√ Leaking or bursting of a blood vessel (hemorrhagic stroke). 
√ Disruption of blood flow to the brain (Transient Ischemic Attack, or TIA). This doesn't cause permanent damage.

*SYMPTOMS;*

√ Trouble with speaking and understanding.
√ Paralysis or numb

 uTrading

 The Trading Infrastructure of the Crypto World

In traditional markets, traders rely on two essential infrastructures:

1️⃣ MetaTrader 4 / MetaTrader 5 for execution
2️⃣ TradingView for analysis

Crypto lacks a unified, structured trading infrastructure.

uTrading is built to fill that gap.

 Beyond a Tool.

 A Systematic Trading Infrastructure.

uTrading is not a strategy marketplace.
Not a signal group.
Not a simple trading bot.

It is a modular execution and strategy infrastructure that standardizes how crypto trading is analyzed, structured, and executed.

 Four Trading Architectures

 One Unified Execution Framework

uTrading structures trading into four execution models:

 1️⃣ Automated Trading

Fully algorithmic execution.

Each automated strategy is parameterized and model-driven.
Entries, scaling, reduction, and exits are triggered by:

1️⃣Indicator conditions
2️⃣ Volatility models
3️⃣ Statistical thresholds
4️⃣ Predefined execution logic

No discretionary override.
Pure model execution.

 2️⃣ Synchronized Trading (Copy Infrastructure)

Structured capital replication layer.

1️⃣ Strategy providers deploy models
2️⃣ Followers replicate execution proportionally
3️⃣ Risk allocation is algorithmically scaled

Not social hype.
But structured strategy synchronization.

 3️⃣ Signal-Based Trading

Event-driven execution architecture.

Signals can trigger:

1️⃣ Entry
2️⃣ Add position
3️⃣ Reduce position
4️⃣ Full exit

Signals are derived from:

1️⃣ Technical indicators
2️⃣ Pattern recognition
3️⃣ Quantified thresholds
4️⃣ External strategy feeds

Signal becomes structured execution — not emotional reaction.

 4️⃣ Manual Trading (Structured Discretion)

Manual does not mean unstructured.

Even manual traders operate inside:

1️⃣ Strategy templates
2️⃣ Indicator-based triggers
3️⃣ Position management frameworks
4️⃣ Risk boundary constraints

Human judgment operates within systematic guardrails.

 Strategy as a Modular Layer

Every trading mode has dedicated strategy architectures:

Grid & Mean Reversion
Trend & Momentum
Relative-Value
Arbitrage
Portfolio Rebalancing

Each strategy supports programmable triggers for:

Open Position
Add Position
Reduce Position
Close Position

Strategies are not static scripts.
They are structured rule engines.

 From Indicator to Execution

In uTrading:

Indicator → Signal → Position Logic → Risk Constraint → Execution

The entire decision chain is standardized.

This transforms trading from reaction
into structured probability management.

 The Infrastructure Thesis

Markets evolve.

Speculation tools come and go.

But infrastructure endures.

uTrading aims to become:

1️⃣ The execution layer for retail and semi-professional traders
2️⃣ The strategy container for quantitative models
3️⃣ The synchronization network for capital replication
4️⃣ The standardized framework for crypto trading discipline

Not just a bot.
Not just a charting tool.

But the Trading Infrastructure of Crypto.

 Strategic Vision

If MetaTrader defined forex execution
And TradingView defined retail charting

uTrading defines:

Systematic crypto trading architecture.

caption:
*HOW TO SPOT CANCER EARLY*

Different types of cancer show up with different symptoms.

 Spotting these symptoms early plays a major role in reducing the risk of complications and spread.

What are some of the hints to look out for?

👇

➡️For Breast Cancer look out for;

1•Hard lump in the breast or around the armpit

2•Likely to notice changes  in breast size, shape, or texture

3• Nipple discharge that is not the usual breast milk

4• Redness on the skin

➡️For Lung Cancer look out for ; 

1•Persistent cough that won’t go away

2•Coughing up blood

3•Shortness of breath with nonstraneous activities

4• Chest pain, especially when breathing deeply

➡️For Colon Cancer look out for 

1•Persistent diarrhea or constipation

2•Blood in stool (dark or bright red)

3•Stomach pain that doesn’t go away

4•Unexplained weight loss & fatigue

➡️For Prostate Cancer look out for ; 

1• Difficulty passing urine  or weak urine flow

2• Frequent urination, especially at night

3• Blood in urine or semen

4• Erectile dysfunction

➡️For Pancreatic Cancer look out for ;

1• Jaundice (Yellowish skin or eyes )

2• Dark urine, light-coloured stools

3• Upper abdominal pain radiating  to the back

4• Sudden, unexplained weight loss

➡️For Stomach Cancer look out for ;

1• Frequent indigestion & bloating

2• Feeling full after eating small amount of food 

3• Nausea, vomiting (may be accompanied sometimes with blood)

4•Unexplained fatigue & weight loss

➡️For Liver Cancer look out for ;

1• Jaundice 

2• Upper right abdominal  pain or swelling

3• Persistent fatigue

4• Unexplained weight loss

➡️For Cervical Cancer look out for ; 

1• Abnormal vaginal bleeding (could happen after  genital party, between periods, or after menopause)

2• Persistent pelvic pain

3• Strong-smelling vaginal discharge

4• Pain during genital party

*Xenophobia: The Short Version*

Xenophobia = fear of strangers. From Greek _xenos_ "foreigner" + _phobos_ "fear."

*What it looks like:*
Fear, distrust, or hatred of people from other countries, cultures, or groups. Not just dislike – it’s the instinct to see "outsiders" as a threat.

*Why it spreads:*
1. *Scarcity panic* – "They’ll take jobs/housing/resources."
2. *Uncertainty* – Unfamiliar languages, customs, faces feel risky to the brain.
3. *Tribal shortcuts* – Us vs Them is easy. Understanding takes work.

*What it costs:*
Kills innovation, fractures communities, and turns neighbors into suspects. Every nation built by immigrants eventually forgets it was built by immigrants.

*Antidote:*
Proximity beats prejudice. Share a meal. Hear a story. Most "them" turns into "us" once you know a name.

Fear shrinks the world. Curiosity makes it bigger.

caption:
*Xenophobia: The Short Version*

Xenophobia = fear of strangers. From Greek _xenos_ "foreigner" + _phobos_ "fear."

*What it looks like:*
Fear, distrust, or hatred of people from other countries, cultures, or groups. Not just dislike – it’s the instinct to see "outsiders" as a threat.

*Why it spreads:*
1. *Scarcity panic* – "They’ll take jobs/housing/resources."
2. *Uncertainty* – Unfamiliar languages, customs, faces feel risky to the brain.
3. *Tribal shortcuts* – Us vs Them is easy. Understanding takes work.

*What it costs:*
Kills innovation, fractures communities, and turns neighbors into suspects. Every nation built by immigrants eventually forgets it was built by immigrants.

*Antidote:*
Proximity beats prejudice. Share a meal. Hear a story. Most "them" turns into "us" once you know a name.

Fear shrinks the world. Curiosity makes it bigger.

“Did you know prostate problems can worsen high blood pressure and diabetes?”

Most men think prostate enlargement only affects urine, but the truth is, it can trigger or worsen other health conditions. When you wake up several times at night to urinate, your sleep is broken. Poor sleep increases stress hormones, which raise your blood pressure and blood sugar.

On top of that, the constant straining to pass urine adds physical stress on the body, making the heart and kidneys work harder. This is why many men with untreated prostate problems also battle hypertension and diabetes complications without knowing the connection.

*Why do Men have low Sperm count?.*

*Why can't some Men impregnate Women?.*

*What can they do?.*

The Sperm are tadpole looking structures produced by the Balls (Testicles)

For a Man to impregnate a woman the Sperm has to be in good condition as unhealthy won't be able to get the woman pregnant.

So we look for some specific things in the sperm.

*The count* - if lower than normal range . Bad

*Movement* - if a lot of the sperm aren't moving - not good.

*Appearance* - some sperms can have more than one head or tail. Abnormal sperms not good.

*Acidity or Alkalinity of Semen* - you need the Semen to have a good ph to work well. 

*Viscocity* - the time it takes for the sperm to melt to liquid and how thick it is 

We look for organisms that can cause infections.

*Volume* - How much of Sperm you're able to produce ( some people produce little or No sperm at all)

Hence SEMEN ANALYSIS not just only count should be done.

*What causes Low sperm count?.*

Infections - STDs, bacteria,  viruses many can enter this tract and affect Sperm production.

Having one Testicle (because the second is missing)

Some drugs can affect sperm production.

Unhealthy Stress

*Low Testosterone*  - Testosterone controls sperm production, it is controlled by the Brain.

So any Brain problem, or Balls problems 

- exposure to some chemicals

Some people are born with conditions that affect sperms.

Some surgeries

Something called VARICOCELE(We'll talk about this varicocele very soon.)

Normally in the Balls, veins regulate the temperature. Because sperm are sensitive small change like this they die.

In VARICOCELE the veins become abnormal and swollen ..of course can affect the Sperm integrity leading to low sperm count.

Some others

- Alcohol
- Smoking cigarettes 
- using Hard drugs
- some diseases like Mumps in the childhood if not well treated
- Obesity 
- People that take Anabolic steroids like Gym Bros and fitness enthusiasts. 
- 
*How do we address these sperm problems?.*

First, most times men don't even know their semen has problems until they get married or go for tests.

*Why is it important to have a Semen analysis before marriage?*

Because many marriages have collapsed due to this issue. 

After adequate tests had been done, It helps us know why the man has low sperm count.

From treating infection, 
Addressing hormone problems,  lifestyle changes,  sometimes Surgery ( Hernia, Turp, Varicocele)

There's no single one exempted from these low sperm count issues.


We need to know why  this is happening first. 

*How do you reduce your risk of Low sperm count?.* 

Eat Healthy foods.
Stop smoking .
Stop alcohol and hard drugs. 
Don't wear tight panties(Women included).
Avoid unnecessary exposure to X-rays, chemicals etc.
Don't go buy so-called  manpower drugs like Viagra and tramadol in the name of trying to impress her in the inner room.
Do your Semen analysis and see a Doctor before marriage.

Low sperm count is something that can easily be managed.

textContent:
*STROKE; Treatment.*

*Stroke* occurs when the blood supply to part of your brain is interrupted or reduced, depriving brain tissue of oxygen and nutrients. Within minutes, brain cells begin to die.

*CAUSES;*

√ Blocked artery (ischemic stroke).
√ Leaking or bursting of a blood vessel (hemorrhagic stroke). 
√ Disruption of blood flow to the brain (Transient Ischemic Attack, or TIA). This doesn't cause permanent damage.

*SYMPTOMS;*

√ Trouble with speaking and understanding.
√ Paralysis or numb

caption:
🔑 BACTERIAL VAGINOSIS (BV)

Bacterial vaginosis is a common vaginal condition caused by an imbalance of normal bacteria in the vagina. 

It is not a sexually transmitted infection, but sexual activity can increase the risk.

In a healthy vagina, good bacteria help keep the environment balanced. BV happens when harmful bacteria grow too much and overpower the good ones, leading to symptoms.

🔑 Common symptoms include
- thin white or grey discharge
- a strong fishy smell especially after sex
- vaginal itching, and 
- sometimes burning during urination. 
- Some women may have BV without any symptoms.

🔑 CAUSES
- BV is more common in sexually active women, but it can also occur in women who are not sexually active. Having multiple sexual partners or a new partner increases the risk.

- Washing the vagina is one of the biggest causes of BV. It disrupts the natural balance of bacteria in the vagina and makes infections more likely. The vagina cleans itself and does not need washing inside.

- Using scented soaps, vaginal sprays, antiseptics, or perfumed pads can irritate the vagina and alter its natural balance, increasing the risk of BV.

- Unprotected sex can contribute to BV by changing the vaginal environment. Semen affects vaginal acidity, which can promote the growth of harmful bacteria.

- Poor genital hygiene or wiping from back to front after using the toilet can introduce unwanted bacteria into the vagina.

HOW TO PREVENT BACTERIAL VAGINOSIS

- Avoid washing the vagina. Clean only the external genital area with mild, unscented soap and water.

- Limit the number of sexual partners and practice safer sex. Using condoms can help maintain a healthy vaginal balance.

- Avoid scented feminine products, harsh soaps, and vaginal deodorants.

- Wear breathable cotton underwear and avoid tight clothing that traps moisture.

- Wipe from front to back after using the toilet to prevent the spread of bacteria.

- Complete your treatment if BV is diagnosed. Stopping medication early can lead to recurrence.

🔑 WHAT IF YOU HAVE IT?
- see a healthcare provider to get proper antibiotics if needed, otherwise BV often comes back.

 Paying close attention to everyday habits can go a long way in keeping the vagina healthy.

Brief History of Oduduwa
Oduduwa is a central figure in Yoruba history, culture, and mythology, regarded as the progenitor (ancestor) of the Yoruba people.
According to Yoruba tradition, Oduduwa was sent from the heavens by the supreme deity, Olodumare, to create the earth. He descended with a chain, a handful of sand, and a chicken. After pouring the sand on the primordial waters, the chicken spread it out to form land—this place became Ile-Ife, considered the cradle of Yoruba civilization.
Historically and culturally, Oduduwa is also seen as the first king (Ooni) of Ife. From him descended many Yoruba kings and royal lineages across cities like Oyo, Benin, and others.
While some accounts describe Oduduwa as a divine being, others suggest he may have been a historical leader who migrated into the region and established a powerful kingdom. Over time, his story became a blend of history and mythology.
Today, Oduduwa remains a powerful symbol of unity, origin, and identity among the Yoruba people.

*Fatty liver* is the accumulation of *triglycerides* and other fats in the liver cells. The amount of fatty acid in the liver depends on the balance between the processes of delivery and removal. In some patients, fatty liver may be accompanied by hepatic inflammation and liver cells death (steatohepatitis).

 Potential pathophysiologic mechanisms for fatty liver include the following:

Decreased mitochondrial fatty acid beta-oxidation

Increased endogenous fatty acid synthesis or enhanced delivery of fatty acids to the liver

Deficient incorporation or export of triglycerides as very low-density lipoprotein (VLDL).

*Symptoms of Fatty Liver*

Non alcoholic Fatty Liver (NAFLD) usually causes no signs and symptoms. When it does, they may includes👇👇:

*Fatigue*

*Pain or discomfort in the upper right abdomen*

*Possible signs and symptoms of NASH and advanced scarring (cirrhosis) includes:👇👇*

*Abdominal swelling (ascites)*

*Enlarged blood vessels just beneath the skin's surface*

*Enlarged spleen*

*Red palms*

*Yellowing of the skin and eyes (jaundice)*

 *Causes of Fatty Liver*

Doctor's don't know exactly why some people accumulate fat in the liver while others do not. Similarly, there is limited understanding of why some fatty livers develop inflammation that progresses to cirrhosis.

Non Alcoholic Fatty Liver(NAFLD) and NASH are both linked to the following:

*Overweight or obesity*

*Insulin resistance, in which your cells don't take up sugar in response to the hormone insulin*

*High blood sugar (hyperglycemia), indicating prediabetes or type 2 diabetes*

*High levels of fats, particularly triglycerides, in the blood*

These combined health problems appear to promote the deposit of fat in the liver. For some people, this excess fat acts as a toxin to liver cells, causing liver inflammation and NASH, which may lead to a buildup of scar tissue in the liver.

 *Complications*

*Fluid buildup in the abdomen (ascites)*

*Swelling of veins in your esophagus (esophageal varices), which can rupture and bleed*

*Confusion, drowsiness and slurred speech (hepatic encephalopathy)*

*Liver cancer*

*End-stage liver failure, which means the liver has stopped functioning.*

*Treatment of Fatty Liver.*

*Kad Hp3 & kaved* will cleanse and detoxify the liver,guaranteed to give your liver the care and attention it needs to recover and improve your health and well-being.

The Weekly Community Pool is based on team sales volume from:

- Sandwich 100-day & 180-day contracts
- Atomic Arbitrage 60-day & 120-day contracts
- Prediction Market 60-day & 90-day contracts

Example shown in deck
If a team below V5 generates 100,000 USDT in sales:

- First qualified V5 receives 2% = 2,000 USDT
- If there are 2 V5, both share the same total reward from that same sales volume
- V6 receives only the difference between V6 and V5
- Same differential logic continues up to V7 and V8

The example table shows:

V5 — 2%
V6 — additional 2% differential
V7 — additional 2% differential
V8 — additional 2% differential

Special V8 note
If a V8 leader has a small team and no one in that team reaches V5 or above, then V8 receives 8% directly from the team’s total qualified sales volume.

Example shown:
100,000 USDT × 8% = 8,000 USDT
